items.desc: Two men, 25 and 40, were found hanging in separate locations under Lalmatia police limits in Godda; police await post-mortem reports and probe ongoing.

items.desc: Bhubaneswar BMC hands towing services to city police as sole authority, ending multi-agency confusion and improving traffic enforcement and vehicle recovery.

items.title: Chennai Metro Rail to repair Phase-1 Stations, upgrade property
items.desc: CMRL tenders Phase-1 metro station refurbishment and upgrades, replacing false ceilings and finishes, and adding commercial space at 12 stations to boost revenue.

items.title: HC dismisses plea to rename Madurai Gandhi Museum
items.desc: Madras High Court dismisses PIL seeking to rename Madurai’s Gandhi Memorial Museum as Rani Mangammal Palace, citing lack of locus and no merit.

items.title: Farmer’s electrocution triggers road blockade, anger over ‘negligence’
items.desc: Farmer Basappa Pujari, 42, dies of electrocution in Kalaburagi’s Afzalpur; villagers block highway, allege lineman negligence; police register case.

items.title: Why Some People Feel Safer in Chaos Than in Calm
